fxNote: Live mid-market reference rates (as of 2026-07-14) to convert a foreign receipt to USD, the claim currency (1 USD is about 95.7 INR and about 1.294 SGD). FlowCo reimburses in USD; the team pays in local currency (INR, some SGD) and the assistant converts automatically at these rates, then flags any claim that does not match the converted receipt.

reimbursement.note: Alcohol is never reimbursable. When a receipt includes alcohol, deduct the alcohol line(s) plus their tax and reimburse only the remainder.

notes: Category caps are per expense. Lodging cap is per night.
Receipts are required for any expense over $25.
Expenses under $500 with all checks passing may be cleared in one click.
Anything over $1,000 always requires manager review.
Client entertainment above the meals cap may be approved at the approver's discretion with a documented business purpose.
Employees expense in USD; receipts from travel may be in a foreign currency, in which case the FX conversion must be sanity-checked before approval.
Alcohol is not reimbursable and must be excluded from the reimbursable amount.
